description: A guide designed for business owners who want to understand, step by step, how to hand off calls to a voice assistant. Yourang is an AI voice assistant platform for hotels, restaurants, and rentals — voice agents, workflows, calls, reservations, and a public REST API.
rules: External API base URL pattern is /api/external/v1/
External API uses Bearer API key authentication (Authorization: Bearer <key>), not JWT
Voice agents support Italian, English, French, Spanish, and German
All API operations are multi-tenant: scoped to the organization owning the API key
Outbound calls require the api key permission 'read_write_with_outbound_calls'
